{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's armor
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's armor]] is green and has a [[Skysworn]] emergency wind barrier.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
